REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1010 Balboa Street S.F. Ca.)
Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng. for Rena Harel.

The sale was confirmed at $900,000.00. The sale will be subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $152,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Authority To Sell Settlor/Conservatees Real Property, For Approval Of Funds To Make Repairs For Sale, And For Authority To Execute Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Authority To Sell Settlor/Conservatee'S Real Property, And To Excute Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Petitioner.

Ms. Ng stated that they had six months before they would be out of funds from the reverse mortgage, that her Client was looking for somewhere to move the Conservatee and that the Conservatee was gradually accepting reality. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES

Petition For Auth. To Obtain Reverse Mortgage Against Settlor/Conservatee'S Home For Approval Of Loan Terms And For Setting Of Trustee Bond
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roberta Meyer (Trustor); Sheila Robello (Court-appointed Counsel for Ms. Meyer on the Conservatorship matter); Rena Harel (Petitioner); Lillian Ng (Counsel for Ms. Harel).

After indicating that the general declinations on the Conservatorship were accepted, the Court requested that Ms. Ng file the declinations on the Trust. The Court granted the Petition Appointing Rena Harel the Successor Trustee of the Estate of Roberta Meyer.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Court Investigator: Jeanine Lim; Bailiff: Deputy Obi; Clerk: C. Joy Guandique.
